claim: The explanation or flow view uses no technical jargon (node, dependency, graph, propagation, topology)
A non-technical reader can identify the cause-and-effect relationship from the explanation
The causal explanation covers all relevant causes, not just the immediate trigger
The explanation can be read and understood in under 10 seconds
A non-technical user viewing the flow for 30 seconds can correctly describe what the system does
The user's natural-language modification request resulted in the expected behavior change
